headline: "Time for Action": Kimmeridge Releases Letter to the Future Board of Devon Energy
summary: Kimmeridge, a private investment firm focused on the energy sector, today released an open letter to the future Board of Devon Energy ahead of the closing of its merger with Coterra (CTRA), expected on May 4th, 2026.

summary: Kimmeridge on Tuesday urged shaleproducer Devon Energy's incoming board to swifty pursueasset sales, improve capital allocation and revamp executive payto boost shareholder returns after its merger...
